message:
fix: assert 4-arg emitError call in DynamicCardErrorBoundary test (Fixes #9868) (#9869)

The source now passes a 4th `extra` arg ({ error, componentStack }) so
emitError can populate the GA4 error_type / component_name dimensions
added in #9861. vitest's toHaveBeenCalledWith is strict on arity, so
asserting only 3 args fails the test. Update the assertion to include
the 4th arg via expect.objectContaining.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
